metadata.description: Football academy in Douala dedicated to the sporting, academic and human development of young African talents.

home.heroSubtitle: An academy based in Douala, dedicated to the sporting, academic and human development of young talents.
home.partnersBandSubtitle: Partners dedicated to performance and talent development.
home.promiseSubtitle: A complete development model to grow the player, the student and the leader.
home.statsHeadline: A structured academy to develop tomorrow's talents.
home.statsSubtitle: A complete framework that supports each player on the pitch, at school and in their personal growth.
home.quote: We don't just train players, we build leaders.
home.exploreSubtitle: Discover the pillars of our development project.

explore.program: A structured 5-step journey, from recruitment to support towards the top level.
explore.training: 4 sessions per week led by qualified staff, following professional standards.
explore.education: Demanding academic monitoring and personal development at the heart of the project.
explore.performanceLab: Data, video and technology serving each player's progression.

home.newsSubtitle: Follow academy life, matches and events.
home.ambassadorsSubtitle: Individuals based abroad who support the academy through donations, their network and visibility.

promo.headline: Join the first intake
promo.tagline: Your chance. Your pitch. Your future starts here.
promo.countdown: Registration closes in {days} D : {hours} H : {mins} MIN

academy.title: Who are we?
academy.subtitle: Ninety One Foot Academy is based in Douala, born to identify, train and support young African talents towards their full potential.

vision.title: Vision & Values
vision.quote: Our ambition is clear: to build the next generation of leaders who will shine African football.

education.title: Education & Personal Development
education.subtitle: Training the mind to unlock potential.
education.quote: A well-trained player today, a leader tomorrow.

performanceLab.title: Performance Lab
performanceLab.heroTitle: Data at the service of potential.

partners.title: Partners
partners.heroTitle: Strong partners at the service of performance.

ambassadors.title: Patrons and ambassadors
ambassadors.intro: Our patrons are individuals based abroad who support the academy through financial or material donations, by talking about our project, seeking partners and sponsors, and connecting the academy with international clubs and organizations. This role is distinct from academic mentoring: it is primarily about contributing to the academy's visibility and development.
ambassadors.sectionSubtitle: They believe in our vision and support the project from abroad.

howToItems.visibility: Talk about the academy in your network
howToItems.connections: Connect us with clubs and organizations abroad

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.subtitle: Life at Ninety One Foot Academy

join.title: Join the academy
join.subtitle: Are you between 15 and 17? Want to progress in a structured environment?

recruitment.submitted: Application submitted. Your PDF is downloading and will also be emailed.

footer.slogan: More than an academy, a movement. More than a dream, a mission.
